programme.desc: Nina sabotages her friend Joan's romance out of jealousy. After seeing Blake's kindness and Joan's pain, she confesses, fixes the relationship, and finds her own love with Peter's son.

programme.title: What He Draws in Steal a Brainrot Comes to Life
programme.desc: Zack, an aspiring Roblox artist, faces bullying and family poverty. Encouraged by his friend Nora and YouTuber Foltyn, he restarts his channel. His viral success eventually saves his family's home.

programme.title: Girl Bullied for Being Wrestler
programme.desc: Riley secretly wrestles while her mother pushes for a traditional life. After her boyfriend issues an ultimatum, she chooses her dream, earns her mother's support, and begins training with a pro.

programme.title: Teacher Gets Revenge on School Bully
programme.desc: After his teacher helps him transform from a scrawny victim to a confident student, Miles realizes his bully, Grant, is hiding a painful home life. Miles records evidence of Grant's abusive stepfather, helping Grant find safety and redemption.

programme.title: Scrawny Teen Takes Pills to Beat Bully
programme.desc: Scrawny Ethan is pressured to take steroids by a corrupt coach. Choosing hard work over shortcuts, he trains with the school janitor to beat his bully in a showdown and expose the coach's crimes.

programme.title: 10-Year-Old Genius Kid Takes CEO's Job
programme.desc: Grady, a grumpy veteran ad executive, is replaced by a 10-year-old child prodigy CEO. After a fierce rivalry, Grady learns modern tech while the boy realizes he just wants to be a normal kid.

programme.title: Poor Girl's Gift Shamed at Birthday Party
programme.desc: Poor immigrant Mateo sells blood to buy his daughter a dress for a rich friend's party. After an attorney discovers Mateo's tragic past and workplace abuse, he helps reunite the family in the USA.

programme.title: Mean Girl Rejects an Autistic Girl, She Lives to Regret It
programme.desc: Mean girl Tessa bullies Heavenly, a new student with autism. After meeting an autistic waiter who helps her with math, Tessa learns that disability isn't inability and teams with Heavenly to win.

programme.title: Influencer Is Dumped By Famous Girlfriend
programme.desc: Desperate to revive his YouTube channel, Timmy prioritizes collabs with Allison Day over his girlfriend Trish, even missing her birthday. After hitting 10 million subs, he realizes his self-absorption, apologizes, and offers to pay for Trish's dream art school tuition and move to New York with her.

programme.title: Girlfriend Gives Guy Ultimatum
programme.desc: YouTuber Anas Marwah, struggling with confidence, breaks up with his unsupportive girlfriend, Morgan. He finds love and partnership with Asala, and together they build his channel into a massive success, buying the house Morgan claimed he'd never afford.

programme.title: Daughter Kicks Mom Out Of Wedding
programme.desc: Ellie struggles with her overbearing mom, Jackie, who's hijacking her wedding plans. Ellie nearly calls off the wedding, but a reconciliation with her mom, and a few surprise interventions, give Ellie the beautiful, personal day she always dreamed of.

programme.title: Nerd Scams Hot Girls On Dating Apps
programme.desc: Dayton catfishes Lilac to draw business to his mom's failing restaurant, attracting an influencer who exposes him. After his mom is hurt, Dayton apologizes in a viral TikTok, leading to Lilac's forgiveness and a flood of supportive customers.

programme.title: Guy Rejects Girl's New Personality
programme.desc: Carly pretends to be a helpless "girly girl" to win Lucas. He rejects her deceit, saying he misses the old her. Carly returns to her authentic self, and Lucas reveals he likes the real her, asking her to the dance.

programme.title: Girl Catches Guy Cheat On 4K Camera
programme.desc: Student journalist Tara investigates basketball star David's suspicious grades. She uncovers a cheating scandal orchestrated by the Principal, who's seeking revenge on his brother. Tara's exposé saves the team and exposes the truth.

programme.title: Best Friends' Double Date Goes Horribly Wrong

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this episode of Minutes With, former city trader Gary Stevenson reveals more about his extraordinary life making millions as the world's best trader in London. Despite being expelled from school at age 16, Gary persisted and won his dream job in a global bank by mastering a card game, even though it was rigged against him. In this episode, Gary reveals how it feels to win $35 million betting on an economic downturn, the bizarre ways millionaires act on the trading floor and why he walked away from banking to warn the world about rising wealth inequality.

programme.title: Minutes With

programme.title: Honesty Box

programme.title: Minutes With: Episode 151
programme.desc: Andreas Christopheros shares how he survived a life-changing attack, opening up on recovery, resilience and rebuilding his life, from the moment it happened to the years of treatment and strength that followed.

programme.title: Minutes With

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Baz Hulse, who was jailed for 10 years in a prison in India for smuggling diazepam tablets, tells us about his life inside prison, the culture shock he experienced and the mental strength he needed to push through.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Minnesota Vikings wide receiver Justin Jefferson joins us for a hilarious game of Snack Wars: UK v USA. Harvey and Lyla try all sorts of treats, from KSI and Logan Paul's PRIME drink to a classic McDonald's Egg McMuffin. It's UK vs US, but who will come out on top?

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Timothée Chalamet and Austin Butler pit US and UK foods against each other to see who takes the ultimate title of reigning snack champion. The pair has a great time being introduced to British classics, and cause carnage trying a royal favourite! Millie Bobby Brown tackles meals from the UK and the US, including carrot cake, liquorice allsorts and energy drinks. The Stranger Things star compares Bovril to a Starbucks vanilla latte, and faces her biggest food gripe: quinoa.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Simon Pegg and Pom Klementieff go head-to-head as they taste the weirdest, most wonderful corners of British and French cuisine, from dodging jellied eels to braving escargot and trying to decipher what on earth a Brain Licker is.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Tottenham Hotspur football player Son Heung-min joins us for a game of Snack Wars: UK v Korea! The Premier League legend tells us which of his teammates he would share his candy with, tries pickled onions, and discovers what Tottenham cake is! James McAvoy puts snacks from both England and Scotland to the test in LADbible's Snack Wars! The actor compares the likes of espresso martinis and pork pies to deep-fried Mars bars and haggis.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: The hilarious Stephen Graham decides which region of the UK has the better snacks... North or South? He has a great time sampling the likes of saveloy, gingerbread and jellied eels and sparks the age-old debate about the pronunciation of 'scone'. Singer and songwriter Burna Boy tries some of Britain's most iconic meals in Snack Wars, comparing them to foods from his birthplace of Nigeria. He tackles cauliflower cheese, recalls the time Pot Noodle 'saved his life' and drinks a lot of Pimm's.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Niall Horan compares Irish and British snacks and has an incredible time pouring the PERFECT pint of Guinness and recounts a hilarious story involving Lewis Capaldi and Buckfast!

programme.title: Snack Wars

programme.title: Snack Wars: Episode 72

programme.title: Snack Wars

programme.title: Jodha Akbar
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.desc: Rumors spread that the Dreams' new general manager, Seung Su, is planning to trade the team's most famed player, Dong Gyu, for reasons unbeknownst to the employees. programme.title: Hot Stove League Ep.3 (English Dub)

programme.title: Hot Stove League Ep.4 (English Dub)
programme.desc: Seung Su and Se Young call everyone to identify the irregularity of the scouting division. Meanwhile, an unexpected guest visits the office, and their meeting takes a new turn.

programme.title: Hot Stove League Ep.5 (English Dub)
programme.desc: Seung Su and his team leave for California to recruit Miles, but they get bewildered by the unexpectedly high cost. In the meantime, Kyung Min offers Seung Su a new amount of money for the down payment of foreign players, and their target changes into someone unsuspected.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.3
programme.desc: Back in her hometown, Mi Young is shocked to learn she's pregnant—and her mother finds out, too. Lee Gun heads to Mi Young's mom's ssambap restaurant with President Park. Yong plays a video of Lee Gun and Mi Young—found on Gun's USB—for Chairwoman Wang, but her unexpected reaction throws him off. Meanwhile, Mi Young goes alone to the OB-GYN clinic, where she meets Daniel.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.4
programme.desc: Disheartened after repeated failures to find his sister, Daniel is in a slump. Through Chief Tak, Gun learns about a mysterious stimulant. Mi Young moves into Gun's lavish home, but finds herself caught between Gun's coldness and the chairwoman's kindness.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.5
programme.desc: Startled by Gun's sudden chill after the wedding, Mi Young is taken aback when he even presents divorce papers. To steady him, Chairwoman Wang recommends a prenatal class for Mi Young, and Gun reluctantly attends. Meanwhile, Gun bumps into Daniel and Mi Young at the chairwoman's house.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.6
programme.desc: Outside the prenatal class, Gun and Mi Young run into one of Se Ra's friends, while Se Ra decides to return to Korea after her New York performance. Hearing that an industrial-waste plant is slated for Yeo-ul Island, Mi Young feels betrayed by Gun, and her sudden change in attitude starts to irk him.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.7
programme.desc: Gun grows uneasy about Daniel's presence, and Mi Young tries to keep her distance from Gun. Mi Ja arrives in Seoul with Mr. Choi and goes out with Mi Young upon hearing Gun sold the Yeo-ul Island factory, she's furious. Meanwhile, Gun suggests that he and Mi Young start sharing a room.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.8
programme.desc: Gun shows Mi Young around his office, but Se Ra's unexpected arrival flusters him. He tries to tell Se Ra about his marriage, but Mi Young stops him.

programme.title: New Recruit Ep.6
programme.desc: With the arrival of the elite new recruit Cha Byeong-ho, Park Min-seok's status takes a pitiful, miserable plunge. Seizing the opportunity to redeem himself, Park targets the upcoming counter-infiltration drill. When a suspicious intruder suddenly appears before him, Park Min-seok throws himself into a desperate struggle to make the catch.

programme.title: New Recruit Ep.7
programme.desc: A transfer order is issued to Park Min-seok. Will he follow his father's demands and move to another unit? Or will he choose to stay and complete his service without further trouble? Meanwhile, the new villain, Seong Yun-mo, puts Kang Chan-seok in jeopardy with a formal grievance letter. In a fit of rage, Chan-seok directs his explosive anger toward the innocent Dong-woo...

programme.title: New Recruit Ep.8
programme.desc: The company has fallen into utter chaos. To bring the situation under control, the officers implement a series of MOS (Military Occupational Specialty) reassignments. This leads to a major crisis for the 1st Squad! Is the new soldier being traded for the ace, Cha Byeong-ho, really Seong Yun-mo?! Late at night, while searching for Yun-mo who disappeared during night watch, Sang-hoon is overcome by an ominous feeling.

programme.title: New Recruit Ep.9
programme.desc: Seong Yun-mo sets a dangerous plan in motion to get sent to the Green Camp! As his scheme unfolds exactly as calculated, the company spirals further into chaos. A long, desperate struggle ensues as the members of the company fight to overcome the looming crisis.

programme.title: New Recruit Ep.10
programme.desc: The conclusion of the "silent war" between the members of the 1st Squad, who are determined to bring Seong Yun-mo to justice, and Seong Yun-mo himself, who is desperate to be sent to Green Camp.

programme.title: New Recruit Season.2 Ep.1
programme.desc: A new company commander has arrived at the 2nd Company! Park Min-seok, who is gradually evolving into a proper Private First Class by managing his successors in his own clumsy way, enjoys peaceful days with his fellow soldiers—but for how long? Meanwhile, Kang Chan-seok, whose life has become a living hell after being targeted by seniors with gang ties, feels as though a breaking point is fast approaching.

programme.title: New Recruit Season.2 Ep.2
programme.desc: Unable to endure the abuse any longer, Kang Chan-seok finally snaps and causes a major incident. Desperate to return to his original unit, he recklessly confronts the 2nd Company Commander, begging for a transfer back. After reviewing the string of incidents that have plagued the 2nd Company, the commander takes matters into his own hands to tighten the lax discipline. His first move? A face-to-face sit-down with the military royalty, Park Min-seok.

programme.title: New Recruit Season.2 Ep.3
programme.desc: After making a secret deal with the Company Commander, Kang Chan-seok returns to the same barracks as Kim Dong-woo, leaving everyone in utter shock. Meanwhile, the Commander reviews the company's unrealistic "Elite Warrior" statistics and decides to personally oversee the selection process to weed out the frauds. Starting now, all personnel who haven't earned the "Elite Warrior" title are restricted from taking leave?!

programme.title: New Recruit Season.2 Ep.4
programme.desc: The members of the 3rd Squad are holding a "welcome back" party for Kang Chan-seok. The festive mood is short-lived, however, when the youngest recruit accidentally spills ramen broth all over Chan-seok while cleaning up. As everyone freezes in terror, remembering his notorious past as a "demon senior," Chan-seok defies expectations by simply laughing it off. With everyone still feeling uneasy, they head into CBRN and obstacle training—only to find the 2nd Company Commander standing there as the lead instructor.

programme.title: New Recruit Season.2 Ep.5
programme.desc: The grueling CBRN and obstacle training has finally begun. Under the commander's ruthless leadership, a string of dropouts occurs as harsh weather conditions push the soldiers to their breaking point. To make matters worse, the instructor waiting for those who fell behind during the drills... is Min-seok's own sister?! Just as Min-seok barely manages to finish the exercises and catches his breath, he realizes the gas regulator is missing from his rifle. The ordeal never ends—if he doesn't find that regulator, he's headed straight for the stockade.

programme.desc: For the first time on British television, Trevor McDonald takes viewers on an immersive journey into the American Mafia gaining close access to people who have experienced firsthand the money, glamour and violence of the United States' most famous organised crime network. Travelling to cities across the United States, Trevor gets inside the lives of people on all sides of the Mafia story, many of whom have never spoken on television before. From ‘made' men who have risen to the heights of power to ruthless killers who have pulled the trigger on the orders of their bosses, Trevor meets men – and their families – who today live in shadow of their time in the Mob.

programme.title: Wild Sex
programme.desc: Sex is at the heart of everything. It's the only real way of leaving a legacy - in the genes of the future. But there's more than just the act - it's the build up to it when wildlife shows its incredible diversity. It drives touching courtships and fierce battles. Hormones and sex drive are forces that shape behaviour and can change an animal's purpose and persona. This is the story of how wild things get sexy.

programme.title: Wild Dolphins
programme.desc: In the waters surrounding New Zealand live a number of dolphin species - each of which has evolved unique strategies in their family pods to survive and thrive in the different habitats around these islands in the Pacific Ocean. On the east coast of the south island off the iconic Kaikoura peninsula, an underwater canyon pushes water seething with nutrients to the surface which provides a year round banquet for huge pods of dusky dolphins. These athletic and highly social dolphins spend their nights feeding out in the canyon, and in early morning they return closer to shore where they rest socialize and play. One of their favourite activities is the “seaweed game” where individuals pass pieces of seaweed to each other practicing fancy maneuvers where they'll catch it on their tail, dorsal or pectoral fins. Down in the south west corner of New Zealand in the majestic landscape of Fiordland live the southern-most bottlenose dolphins. At almost 4 metres long these dolphins have adapted physically to the extreme winter conditions down here by growing bigger and fatter with extra insulating blubber and evolving stubbier beaks and shorter fins and tail flukes to reduce heat loss through their extremities. These fiords are different to the coastal environment in that freshwater sits on top of the denser seawater in a distinct layer, and is much colder than the saltwater and can prove lethal to the pods' calves in winter, so every year the bottlenose dolphins make a short migration to the outer fiords where there is less freshwater to enable their calves to survive. Off New Zealand's north island, in the middle of the Bay of Plenty, the country's most active volcano erupts from the sea, sending plumes of toxic gases rising skywards. In the water surrounding this volcano roam common dolphins - the nomads of the dolphin world. They are pelagic predators which mean they roam the open ocean searching for prey.

programme.title: Eagle Queen of the Skies
programme.desc: Eagles are top predators who battle fiercely for survival and work hard to raise their young. There are 60 members of the eagle clan, all united by their acute eyesight, powerful wings, sharp talons and hooked beaks. To explore the world of the eagle we follow one individual from hatching to leaving the nest and setting up a home. Her fight for survival reveals what it takes to become a queen of the sky.

With more than 470 square kilometres, it is the third largest natural reserve in Schleswig-Holstein. Due to its extensive forest areas, 40 lakes and its proximity to Mecklenburg's biosphere reserve Lake Schalsee, it forms the largest protectoral area alongside the former inner-German border.

programme.desc: Part 2. The Most Haunted team explore the underground of Fort Paull. With its foundations and footprint dating back 100's of years the team are faced with some terrifying ordeals.

programme.title: Annison Funeral Parlour
programme.desc: Coffins, murder and a malevolent spirit plague the team as they investigate this one-time funeral home. With one member isolated alone another in a coffin the team catch a poltergeist in action

programme.title: Wentworth Woodhouse Part 1
programme.desc: Part 1. The upper floors of Wentworth House are a maze of corridors and rooms and the team have one night to investigate as many as possible. With one whistling spirit, groans and loud noises the team are shaken to their core.

programme.title: The Hunt for the Garden of Eden
programme.desc: It's one of the most powerful and enduring myths ever created. The Garden of Eden. One maverick scholar, Dr Juris Zarins sets out to prove its existence.

programme.title: The Relics of Joan of Arc
programme.desc: Forensic pathologist Dr Philippe Charlier, known to the French as the “Indiana Jones of the graveyards” faces his biggest challenge yet: to uncover the truth behind the remains of France's most famous daughter – Joan of Arc.

programme.title: The Real King Solomons Mines
programme.desc: King Solomon ruled Israel 3,000 years ago, famed for a visit from the Queen of Sheba. The quest for Solomon's gold spans millennia. Karl Mauch believed he found Ophir in southern Africa. Yet, the search for Solomon's true mines persists.

programme.desc: Was Presidential hopeful, Robert F. Kennedy really killed by disgruntled Palestinian Sirhan Sirhan as we've been led to believe? Or was he another in a long line of Manchurian candidates, a victim of a long standing mind control program.

programme.title: Bigfoot

programme.title: The Execution of MLK and The Framing of James Earl Ray
programme.desc: In this re-examination of the assassination of civil rights leader Martin Luther King, Richard meets several researchers who provide evidence that the convicted gunman, James Earl Ray was not the real triggerman.

programme.title: Werewolves
programme.desc: The legend of the werewolf throughout history and in various cultures is explored. The Conspiracy Show travels to England and rural Wisconsin to investigate claims of actual werewolf sightings.

programme.title: The Star Child Skull
programme.desc: Richard meets the owners of an abnormal humanoid skull allegedly discovered in Mexico in the 1930s and a researcher who has had the skull subjected to numerous tests including carbon-14 dating, and DNA in order to determine it's origin.

programme.title: The Roswell UFO Crash
programme.desc: Richard speaks with the pre-eminent investigators of the alleged crash of a UFO near Roswell, New Mexico in 1947.

programme.title: S1 E6 Spaceship Earth
programme.desc: Take a ride through the formation of the third planet from the Sun, Earth.

programme.title: S1 E2 Mars: The Red Planet
programme.desc: It has been fifty years since man first ventured into space.

programme.title: S2 E4 The Milky Way
programme.desc: Now we know we're not even at the center of our own galaxy.

programme.title: S6 E10 Our Place in the Milky Way
programme.desc: An exploration of Earth's cosmic neighborhood.

programme.title: S6 E4 Crash Landing on Mars

programme.title: Little Cats
programme.desc: From mysterious lynx to athletic servals and water-bound jungle cats, the little cats of the world are some of the most fascinating and ruthless predators on the planet.

programme.title: Hawaii: Paradise in the Pacific
programme.desc: In epsiode one we take a look at Kaua'i - the oldest island in the archipelago. Kaua'i's isolation for thousands of years led to an increased rate of evolution. In a relatively short time, new species are formed here, many animals and plants can only be found here. But they are in danger.

programme.title: Hawaii: Paradise in the Pacific
programme.desc: In episode two we take a look at Maui and Moloka'i. In the middle of the archipelago they form the heart of Hawaii. The second largest island of Hawai'i - Maui - is a true paradise for surfers. Archie Kalepa was one of the first big wave surfers and is still chasing the thrill today

programme.title: Our Big Blue Backyard
programme.desc: It's summer on New Zealand's Open Bay Islands, and the local population swells. Wily octopus, foraging crayfish and darting penguins are joined by over 4,000 New Zealand fur seals. Masterful divers, they successfully straddle two distinct neighborhoods: beneath the waves, where they play and eat – and these rocky outcrops, where they're born and mate. Mothers balance the demands of nursing pups, mating-keen males, and their own need to efficiently hunt and feed. Everyone here has new mouths to feed, including the scavenging Weka. Unable to fly nor swim, the species was introduced as food for sealers a century ago -- and has been marooned here ever since.

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: What seems calm and tranquil may not necessarily be so. Under the tranquility there maybe a vibrant dynamic world and above water there maybe dangers which are lurking at very corner.

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: Snow Leopard is the one of the most elusive big cats in the world. This episode details how the wildlife guards and the wildlife department has set up conservation and scientific plans to protect and indeed to enumerate and increase it's population

programme.title: Wild and Alive
programme.desc: In the heart of the Ivory Coast a small rural village has a very special resident. The last white rhino in the country sleeps on the village outskirts and feeds on the villagers' crops.

programme.title: Little Cats
programme.desc: From mysterious lynx to athletic servals and water-bound jungle cats, the little cats of the world are some of the most fascinating and ruthless predators on the planet.

programme.title: Hawaii: Paradise in the Pacific
programme.desc: In epsiode one we take a look at Kaua'i - the oldest island in the archipelago. Kaua'i's isolation for thousands of years led to an increased rate of evolution. In a relatively short time, new species are formed here, many animals and plants can only be found here. But they are in danger.

programme.title: Hot Roads
programme.sub-title: The Worlds Most Dangerous Roads - S1 E02
programme.desc: In Bangladesh, the land with the highest density of population in the world (and the highest amount of corruption), the daily struggle to survive is fought everywhere, including the streets. Nowhere do people drive as brutally and recklessly as here. In Bangladesh you drive on the road like others drive with a bumper car: if you need space, you simply ram the car driving next to you. The police only came if there are fatalities. The biggest bottleneck in the transport system is the historical old town of Dhaka. Old Dhaka is a universe of its own, a world of bazaars in which every trade has its own quarter: there are streets of jewelers, sweets makers and fashionable tailors, and the vegetable wholesalers have their warehouses down at the port. The deliveries take place mostly on the river, the Buriganga River, a stinking cesspool. But the sold goods usually leave by land, and the customers also come by the land route – the Nawabpur Road. They generally come in buses or by rickshaw, where too many people are crammed into too little space. The traffic in Dhaka is everyday, normal madness. The film accompanies a rickshaw, a bus and a truck on their dangerous way through the streets of Dhaka and shows how it is possible to survive in what seems to be an incontrollable chaos.

programme.title: Hot Roads
programme.sub-title: The Worlds Most Dangerous Roads - S1 E03
programme.desc: The “Adriatic Highway” is one of the most beautiful coastal roads in the world. The “technical masterwork” was built in the 1950s and 60s, at the time of Yugoslavian President Tito. Abounding in curves, the asphalt road stretches from Ankaran in Slovenia to Ulcinj in Montenegro. More than half of the road is in Croatia (659 km) and a quarter in Montenegro (125 km). Shorter segments lead through Slovenia only nine kilometers are in Bosnia and Herzegovina. For all four countries of the former Yugoslavian Federation, the 1,200-kilometer-long highway remains the main thoroughfare of Adriatic tourism. For many travelers, the highway is the absolute dream road. In dizzying heights, it hugs the steep cliffs lining the Adriatic Sea, winds through coves and bays, gardens and stony fields. Wonderful views of the blue sea, green islands, bizarre cliffs and Mediterranean cities and towns are typical of the highway. But with its numerous curves, the dream road also harbors many dangers.

programme.title: Hot Roads
programme.sub-title: The Worlds Most Dangerous Roads - S1 E04
programme.desc: The air wants to flee the heat, but is too weak. It hovers just above the ground, heavy and weighed down by the oven-like heat. It turns wanly around itself, and tries to cool off by liquefying itself. It vibrates, it oscillates – but there is no escape. This is West Africa in late March. The Harmattan, the hot desert wind of the Sahara, is blowing without respite. It has no pity with the people who live here. Whoever wants to go from one place to another has to travel on roads that hardly deserve this name. They are dusty paths that don't appear on any map. They are maneuverable only with great effort and for a few months of the year. They are impassable during the rainy season, since they are washed over by the Niger River, one of the mightiest rivers in the world. When it starts to rain, the roads turn into muddy paths. Every journey is a trip into uncertainty.

programme.title: Hot Roads
programme.sub-title: The Worlds Most Dangerous Roads - S1 E05
programme.desc: They run through deserts, through ice and snow, deep into the jungle, along the water and over the mountains. The landscapes through which these routes wind are unique and exert their never-ending fascination even on regular travellers. In our documentary “Hot Roads – An Icebound Road” which is part of the five-part film series “Hot Roads” we want to tell the stories that take place along the route itself, of the people who live along it and for whom the road is part and parcel of their personal destiny.

programme.title: World's Most Dangerous Railway Lines
programme.desc: Over 196 bridges and through 55 tunnels, the Bernina Express fights its way from Switzerland to Italy. Powerful forces of nature make the railyway line a dangerous route over the Grisons Alps to this day. The film accompanies the Bernina Express in winter over the highest rail route across the Alps.

programme.title: World's Most Dangerous Railway Lines
programme.desc: The Tanzania-Zambia-Railway (Tazara) is one of Africa's most ambitious infrastructure projects. It connects the inland with the coast of East Africa and meant independence from the surrounding apartheid-ruled countries of East Africa. The film accompanies the Tazara on its 52-hour journey through Tanzania and Zambia and uses spectacular aerial shots to show not only the architectural monuments but also the unknown sides of the previously hidden landscapes of Tanzania and Zambia.

programme.title: World's Most Dangerous Railway Lines
programme.desc: The Pamban Railway crosses the tropical landscape of Tamil Nadu, the former Madras, for around 600 kilometers. Heavy storms and rain showers make the route a challenge for Indian Railways to this day. The film accompanies the "Rameswaram Express" over the notorious Pamban Bridge, the first bridge across the Indian Ocean.

programme.title: World's Most Dangerous Railway Lines
programme.desc: The Ferrocarril del Sur, one of the highest train routes on earth, runs right through the mountains of Peru. To this day, it is considered a miracle in the world of railways. The rails not only lead to the famous ruined city of Machu Picchu but connect the ancient Inca capital of Cusco with Puno on the shores of Lake Titicaca and the gleaming white city of Arequipa. A train journey with the Andes Explorer through a grandiose landscape and an undeveloped and inaccessible area.

programme.title: Bush
programme.desc: Wildest Places explores some of the most incredible natural habitats on earth & a diverse range of wildlife.

programme.title: The Mediterranean South
programme.desc: From the dreamlike Mediterranean and spectacular canyon landscapes of Andalusia, to the expanses of the Extremadura with its holm oak forests that stretch toward the horizon. Even in the south of Spain, highly popular with holidaymakers, there is still much waiting to be discovered. Genets hunt for prey under cover of night. These viverrid representatives can be found in their greatest numbers on the Iberian Peninsula. And nowhere else in Europe are there as many vultures as here in Spain. It's an unparalleled spectacle, when griffon vultures quarrel over carrion. The European Chameleon has a by far more ingenious method of feeding: within a fraction of a second, he shoots out his half-a-metre-long tongue once in his sights, the insects don't have a chance. The unmistakeable hoopoe with his typical feather bonnet is also pleased with the rich variety of insects on offer in Spain. Especially in the spring, when the birds have to feed their insatiable juniors. With around 30,000 brooding couples, white storks have one of their most important areas of distribution in Spain. But it's underwater, where the wealth of animals in Southern Spain reaches its zenith. The protected reserves in the Mediterranean reveal an incomparable variety of species: weird sea slugs of almost alien appearance, graceful sea horses, huge swarms of barracudas and elegant blue sharks all have their habitat here. Spain's south has shaped the identity of the regions inhabitants. The film accompanies a farmer in the Extremadura, Spain's Wild West, as well as a fisherman who operates sustainable fishing off the coast of the Cabo de Gata reserve. Common to both is the fact that neither of them would consider exchanging their homeland for a life in the city. Wild Spain – The Mediterranean South reveals the unknown side of a region that many think they know, but in which there is so much more to discover.

programme.title: Wild Ones
programme.desc: Wild Ones draws inspiration from the rhythms of nature, delving into the wonders of the animal kingdom. This captivating series explores the diverse behaviors that define survival—hunting and feeding strategies, family bonds, defense tactics, and the intricacies of courtship and mating. Who reigns supreme in the wild? Discover the untold stories of nature's fiercest competitors and most fascinating creatures.

programme.title: Wild Ones

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: In this episode we'll explore the animal sense of sight, and you'll see there's a lot more to this than meets the naked eye. People with good vision are sometimes called "eagle eyed", but eagles can see a fish from many dozen metres away.

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: On this episode we travel from the desert, to the forest, Australia to Borneo and back to learn how species as diverse as Bat-eared Foxes, the Bilby, Deer, Kangaroo Rats, cicadas, Proboscis Monkeys and other creatures never miss an auditory trick.

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: On this episode of Animal Super Senses, we get in touch with the feelings of wild animals. Really in touch. Because animals, just like humans, rely heavily on their sense of touch, every day in every way.

programme.title: The Rhino Orphanage
programme.desc: Too small to mix with others, Pemba needs a rhino friend his age, enter orphaned 34 day old, Dwayne. Under-staffed and over-worked, Karen is eager to get the two little guys living together, it should be easy - but little rhinos don't always comply.

programme.title: The Rhino Orphanage
programme.desc: Little Nyani was born premature and was sent to the rhino orphanage. Raising a premature calf is a first for the orphanage. One day the little one is running around, the next she's in Onderstepoort's Veterinary Hospital, fighting for her life.

programme.title: The Rhino Orphanage
programme.desc: Rejected by his mother, Tswalu has been through a lot. It's suspected he's broken his leg, but he's not well enough to travel to the veterinary hospital. He's one of only 800 desert black rhinos left in the world and they'll do anything to save him.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Eighty-eight capuchin monkeys rescued from a research laboratory in Chile wake up to their first morning at Monkey World. Rodders has a run-in with a sticky melon, and Seamus the chimp comes face to face with alpha male Butch.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Wildlife vet John Lewis is given a run for his money when he tries to sedate two excitable chimps. Plus, the male capuchins get used to life together.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: The team are forced to step in when the chimp introduction goes wrong and Ben is injured by the alpha male, orangutan Hsiao-Quai struggles with her ever-growing son Kai, and the park's staff prepare to welcome another baby orangutan into the fold.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Hananya shows that he is not so tough when it comes to needles, while four-month-old woolly monkey Paulo is being hand-reared by Mike and Alison. Elsewhere, the other chimps enjoy a 'banana-fishing' expedition.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Resident capuchin TJ joins the new Chile arrivals, but he seems to be in a mischievous mood, and Alpha male chimp Paddy has to step in and keep his unruly troop in line. Elsewhere, orangutan Amy is pregnant.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: A big decision must be made when alpha male Hananya continues to exhibit violent behaviour. Chimps Simon and Eveline, meanwhile, compete in a swing-off and there is some dental surgery to be done.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: A baby chimp tries to prove he is grown up enough to go it alone. The Bachelor Boys' reputation, meanwhile, takes a hit when they become frightened of a new toy.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: As Zoey the golden-cheeked gibbon goes into labour, the various gibbons in the park seem to know that one of their number is giving birth and have a morning sing-off.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Baby woolly monkey Paulo meets his new family for the first time, young chimpanzee Eddie has fun and games with baby brother Bart, pregnant orangutan Amy gets to grips with a breast pump, and Mad Max the marmoset arrives at the park.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Mad Max meets his new housemates, and chimps Ben and Pip are in shock after another meeting with Hananya. Over in the woolly monkey enclosure, Piquita is the centre of attention and, in Paddy's chimp group, Bart enjoys his first taste of honey.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Pregnant woolly monkey Piquita looks fit to burst, capuchin Sean, over from Chile, is keen to prove that nobody can groom quite like he can, and life hangs in the balance for Blue the ruffed lemur.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Baby woolly monkey Paulo is tempted outside by some delicious bugs, while onions are used to encourage natural behaviour amongst the capuchins. The team also has a radical plan for the third meeting between youngster Ben and alpha male Hananya.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: There is a scuffle between the female capuchins, Tia needs surgery, and orangutan Amy is heavily pregnant - and very grumpy. Meanwhile, there is something new in the play area of the chimp nursery, and Alison has her last visit with Paulo.

programme.title: On the Trails of the Glaciers
programme.desc: Glaciers are found in Alaska at low altitudes, passing through the long valleys before they arrive at the sea.

programme.title: Wild Hope
programme.desc: Centuries of pollution despoiled New York Harbor, turning it into a virtual dead zone. But now, the most ambitious restoration project in any city on Earth aims to bring it back to life.

programme.title: Wild Hope
programme.desc: In southeast Florida, conservationists are out at dawn every morning, surveying and protecting the nests of three turtle species to keep them safe from human traffic.

programme.title: Wild Hope
programme.desc: Crystal River has long been a safe haven for the Florida manatee, but when an invasive algae wiped out the eelgrass that manatees need for food, the community rallied to restore the river and save the animals that call it home.

programme.title: Wild Hope

programme.title: Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: The Parisian adventure continues: Above ground after the catacombs, a parkour expert teaches our host the art of moving across an urban landscape by channeling his inner monkey boy, and as the Technoparade rolls down the Parisian streets he pulls on his connection with DJ Nick V to spin in the most electric moment.

programme.title: Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: A meeting with a woman who secretly transcribed 3,000 Hollywood films while under an oppressive regime inspires Jonathan to make his own movie. So with a small budget and a cast of local actors he scouts Saxon castles, Danube tributaries, and ruined buildings to direct an action adventure flick.

programme.title: Maximum Foodie
programme.sub-title: India: Can Kolkata be considered a foodie destination of India?
programme.desc: Liesel pinballs around a city known for its gastronomy, the forgotten hub of British East India trading company, Kolkata. From trying out what the bustling city's vibrant street food scene has to offer, to the lesser known gems, including, venturing into India's only Chinatown and sampling their delicacies. A tale of walking food tours, hole in the wall joints serving up North Eastern dumplings, messy fish markets, and of course, the pride of Bengal, the Hilsa fish. Is Kolkata up to par with the other major metropolitan cities of India? This episode finds out exactly that!

programme.title: Maximum Foodie
programme.sub-title: Nevada: What else is there in Nevada for foodies besides Vegas?
programme.desc: This investigative mission starts off in the sin city atmosphere of the Vegas strip. After a gluttonous stint at a generic buffet, Liesel is inspired to do a road trip to find iconic gems in the state of Nevada. From ghost towns, to monstrous foodie challenges, to hole in the wall dive bars in the middle of nowhere, this trip has it all. Liesel finds the resurgence of Basque cuisine in Northern Nevada, and learns that Reno can do fine dining as well! A trip to Virginia city also reveals that the Silver State has some haunted bars where patrons from the 1800s are rumored to be still imbibing and spooking locals! It's a road trip in every sense of the word!

programme.title: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: "Sweet Dreams" is a soothing show with gentle lullabies and serene animations. It helps kids relax and fall asleep with ease, making bedtime an enjoyable and comforting experience for the whole family.

programme.title: Animal Sounds
programme.desc: This show blends fun and learning by introducing kids to a musical world where animals take center stage. With catchy tunes, children explore songs about pets and wildlife, fostering care and empathy while enjoying an universe of music and adventure!

programme.title: Let's Play Everyday
programme.desc: This show features nursery songs perfect for any moment, offering a fun and engaging soundtrack for kids' daily adventures. These entertaining and educational tunes captivate young audiences, sparking joy and learning, no matter the activity!

programme.title: Jump for Joy
programme.desc: This show helps kids develop motor skills with fun morning exercise songs, boosting health and happiness. The lively lyrics inspire kids and parents to stay active, making mornings a joyful and healthy start for the whole family!

programme.title: Good Morning, Sunshine!
programme.desc: This show teaches kids valuable habits through songs, guiding them through morning routines like waking up, brushing teeth, eating breakfast, and heading to kindergarten. It's a delightful blend of learning and fun!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance an up and down dance. They watch some children painting pictures and patterns on to eggs. In Teletubbyland, Laa-Laa dances with her ball until the magical tree appears.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch a little boy show us how to make a Turban. The Tubbies go for a walk, but Po, Laa-Laa and Dipsy want to play with their favourite things.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises and teaches the Teletubbies a nursery rhyme. Then they watch Becky go for a ride on a Tram. Po rides her scooter too fast and knocks the other Tubbies over.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies watch some children are playing football in the park. Laa-Laa and Po love playing with the ball. While they play they sing a song about the ball.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies pop up from behind a hill to watch Tamzin Griffin pretend to be Funny Lady and tell the story of the naughty sausage. Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Po go for a walk, so Laa-Laa decides to dance a secret dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children learn about the number three. Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa go for a walk. They count three trees and three flowers and Po follows behind counting too.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are asleep when a voice trumpet appears singing the rhyme 'Frére Jacques'. The Teletubbies laugh and call "Again, again!"

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies see a little girl and her brother who love salad. They go shopping in a market a market with their grandma to buy some salad to eat.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch two boys make Chinese Lanterns with their uncle. In Teletubbyland, it is time for Tubby Toast, but where has Laa-Laa's toast gone?

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies and some children learn about the colour blue. In Teletubbyland Po is watching the blue sky when it begins to rain.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Noo-Noo tidies up Home hill before the Teletubbies slide up the slide to watch Natalie tell us about her brother's christening.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch Sarah and Mark give their sheep a winter-feed. In Teletubbyland, the Teletubbies cannot decide whether to have Tubby Custard or Tubby Toast.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies leave their favourite things to watch some boys spinning some spinning tops to celebrate the Hanukah festival. Tinky Winky wears the skirt on his head to do a very special round and round dance.

programme.desc: Cherry Jam is so enjoying staying in Berry Bitty City, that she calls her managers in Big Bitty City and informs them that she is going to stay for a much needed vacation! programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Plum decides to hold a dance recital at Strawberry's Café Cabaret stage and sends out a stack of invitations. She forgets, however, to check the sign-up sheet at the Café and schedules it for the same night as Blueberry is scheduled to read to the baby Berrykins. Strawberry tells Plum she cannot hold the recital in the Café on her chosen day because the Café is booked.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Raspberry is discovered by a talent scout who wants her to move to Berry Big City and design a new line of Glitter fashions! She will be provided with her own studio, staff, publicity, commitments from big department stores-everything she needs to be a big fashion designing star! All her friends are thrilled for her. Only Cherry is a bit less enthusiastic about Raspberry's stardom, which Raspberry mistakenly interprets as jealousy.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's the last week of summer and Berry Bitty City is hopping with activity as the girls prepare for their tropical island vacation at Berry Breezy Bay Resort. But just as they're about to leave, bad news: the resort is closed for the season due to berry breezy weather. The girls are disappointed, but Orange isn't giving up. She says if they can't go to the tropical island, maybe they can bring the tropical island here!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: With only a few days of summer left, the girls are about to enjoy their first vacation in their newly-created, tropical beach resort at Berry Bitty Lake, when who should descend upon them but Mavis Maraschino, the comically over-the-top "Entertainment Tonight"-style show host. Mavis has dumped her focus on fashions in favor of an even glitzier show called Lifestyles of the Berry Big Bitty Stars, and she wants her first segment to be about how pop superstar Cherry Jam spends her vacation.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: On a beautiful winter's night, Blueberry reads the Baby Berrykins a story of what happened one winter in Berry Bitty City-a winter that almost wasn't. Just as everyone is ready for winter fun and fashions, a sudden warming melts the snow and ruins their plans. Improvising with snowmen made of shaved ice and cotton puffs, Strawberry and her friends play "Capture the Snowman's Carrot Nose." The Berrykins want to join in the fun, so the girls play against them, with Strawberry refereeing.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's another windy winter day, and the postal bees are staying indoors-the wind is too strong for their berry bitty wings. "We don't know when the next mail will get through!" It's bad news for Blueberry, who has been anxiously awaiting the next installment of a Patty Persimmon Detective story. If only she could get to the post office in Berry Bitty Dale where her package is waiting!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It appears winter is finally coming to an end and Raspberry is planning a big fashion show to display her spring line. Her vision is to have the girls model her fashions in a parade past the town fountain. What she didn't realize is that the Berrykins are turning the fountain into a big water show. Every time the girls come to rehearse, they must comically dodge jets of fruit juice from the out-of-control fountain-the Berrykins are still working out the bugs.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry, Cherry and the girls form a new band, Strawberry and the Sweet Beats, and prepare to go on the road to perform at the Opening Ceremony of the Berry Big City Games! While master mechanic Berrykin Bruce turns Cherry's tour bus into the band's hotel-on-wheels, Strawberry and her friends pack for the big trip. But the rest of Berry Bitty City points out that someone needs to run the girls' businesses while they are gone.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Berrykins Ed and Earl report to Princess Berrykin and Strawberry that they are certain there is a monster in the berry patch! They saw something with many noses and many tails making weird noises in the bushes. But upon further investigation by Strawberry and her friends, it is discovered that friendly boy Huckleberry Pie was driving his pet-mobile of orphan dogs through the countryside, took a wrong turn and got stuck near Berry Bitty City.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While enjoying lunch in the café, the girls are interrupted by some music coming from the gazebo. They head outside and find Sadiebug and Kadiebug wearing badges and standing by a banner and podium. A group of chairs are set up in front of them. The twins begin to announce, and then argue, that they are starting a club - a good citizens club. The girls are shocked as the twins argue with each other all the time.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's time again for the Dance-Off between the Big Bitty City Dance Team and the Berry Bitty City Dancers. Plum is stressed out and frazzled because she desperately wants to win. And the Big Bitty City Dancers are a force to be reckoned with. They are elegant and beautifully synchronized. Plum shows the girls a maze of dance steps that she's choreographed in the hopes of creating a winning piece. The problem is, the contest is only 1 week away!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is so enjoying staying in Berry Bitty City, that she calls her managers in Big Bitty City and informs them that she is going to stay for a much needed vacation! Strawberry and the girls are thrilled that she will be with them for a little longer, and they do all they can to make their guest comfortable. But Cherry doesn't want to be treated like a guest she wants to fit in and contribute to the community.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Plum decides to hold a dance recital at Strawberry's Café Cabaret stage and sends out a stack of invitations. She forgets, however, to check the sign-up sheet at the Café and schedules it for the same night as Blueberry is scheduled to read to the baby Berrykins. Strawberry tells Plum she cannot hold the recital in the Café on her chosen day because the Café is booked.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Blueberry is disappointed in the girls' lack of enthusiasm for the Patti Persimmon mystery novels, her favorite book series. She finds herself missing the company of her fellow Persimmon fan Huckleberry, and thinks up a great way to get him to visit. She invites Huck to co-write a story with her to submit to an online mystery magazine.. Huck eagerly accepts and comes for a visit.
